baseline_source: docs/audits/eval-report.json as of this date (demo fixture world, k=5)
note: AIEV-26/27: `wad eval` fails if any current hybrid metric drops more than `tolerance` (relative) below its baseline value here, in addition to the existing beats-popularity gate. Update this file deliberately (with a rationale in the PR) when a real recommender change intentionally moves these numbers — never silently, and never as a side effect of an ordinary `make eval` run.
